summary: High‑quality soundboard recording (minor tape‑flip glitch) of a tight show highlighted by the China > Rider jam, a standout Mind Left Body sequence, soaring Dark Star and a burning Greatest Story.
review: The performance is praised for its exploratory jams – a crisp China > Rider transition, an unusual mid‑tempo Mind Left Body that rolls into Dark Star and a spooky ending before a passionately sung Wharf Rats.  Recording quality is generally excellent with only a brief tape‑flip repeat on Wharf Rat, making the set both sonically clear and musically thrilling.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high ratings (mostly 5★) and enthusiastic comments about both the music and sound quality; only minor recording glitches noted.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear, crisp mix with excellent balance; a few glitches such as a tape‑flip repeat on Wharf Rats are the only notable issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Tight, exploratory flow – the band weaves MLB into Dark Star and a space jam before moving into Eyes, an intense ending jam, and a fiery Wharf Rats, all linked by seamless transitions.

band_member_comments.Phil: Praised for loud “bombs” during the space jam and a fierce tease of The Other One after MLB.
